LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SALLY LIU DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED, TEN DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. COMPLAINT ALLEGES DEFENDANT'S IMPROPER CONDUCT IS CONTINUING. FACTS ALLEGED INDICATE THAT DEFENDANT MAY BE ESTOPPED FROM RAISING ANY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ISSUES. (SEE BATTUELLO VS. BATTUELLO (1998) 64 CAL.APP. 4TH 842. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SALLY LIU DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled, ten days leave to answer. Complaint alleges defendant's improper conduct is continuing. Facts alleged indicate that defendant may be estopped from raising any statute of limitations issues. (See Battuello vs. Battuello (1998) 64 Cal.App. 4th 842. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
